# createMcpServer()

```ts
function createMcpServer(config: ServerConfig): McpServer;
```

Defined in: [server/mcp-server/mcp-server.ts:27](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/1df9da293b0f83cbdcf2bdd1886c4a53f0e3e2c8/src/app/server/mcp-server/mcp-server.ts#L27)

Creates and configures a new MCP server instance.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type                                                                                         | Description                                |
| --------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| `config`  | [`ServerConfig`](../../../../config/mcp-server/mcp-server.config/interfaces/ServerConfig.md) | Server identity and network configuration. |

## Returns

`McpServer`

A fully configured `McpServer` with all domains registered.

## Remarks

Instantiates the MCP server with the provided name and version, then
registers all domain tool modules. Currently registers the coffee domain
via [registerCoffeeDomain](../../../../coffee/coffee.domain/functions/registerCoffeeDomain.md).

## Example

```ts
const config = createServerConfig();
const server = createMcpServer(config);
```
